# рЯОѓ Target Coverage Index

The single source of truth for **target-specific** reversing assets вАФ answers
"have we already reversed target X, and where is it?" before anyone starts new work.

> Source: [`catalog/targets.yaml`](catalog/targets.yaml) ¬Ј regenerate with
> `python catalog/targets.py --write`. This is **not** the capability catalog
> (generic tools/methodologies live in `catalog/android.yaml`, `web.yaml`, вА¶).

**7 targets** вАФ рЯЯҐ 5 in-repo ¬Ј рЯЯ† 2 pointer-only (algorithm in an external repo, not bundled).

| Target | Domain | Protection / SDK | Approach | Status | Assets |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Bilibili** | android | APP-API `sign` (sorted-params MD5 + 4√Чuint32 secret in libbili.so), `x-bili-ticket` (HMAC-SHA256 JWT), `access_key` OAuth2 dual-token refresh | pure-algorithm | рЯЯҐ in-repo | [`skills/android/bilibili-reverse`](skills/android/bilibili-reverse) |
| **Akamai Bot Manager** | web | Akamai Bot Manager вАФ _abck/bm_sz handshake + sensor_data POST (web sensor vs mobile BMP) | pure-algorithm | рЯЯҐ in-repo | [`skills/web/akamai-reverse`](skills/web/akamai-reverse) |
| **Castle.io** | web | Castle anti-bot/device-fingerprint token вАФ Android native v3.1.1 (hex-fp + 3-layer nibble-XOR + base64url) and web v11 | pure-algorithm | рЯЯҐ in-repo + рЯОђ case | [`skills/web/castle-reverse`](skills/web/castle-reverse) ¬Ј [`cases/dailypay-castleio-android`](cases/dailypay-castleio-android) |
| **PerimeterX / HUMAN** | web | PerimeterX/HUMAN sensor вАФ _pxN cookies (payload/HMAC/OB/SID modules; WASM PoW) | pure-algorithm | рЯЯҐ in-repo | [`skills/web/px-reverse`](skills/web/px-reverse) ¬Ј [`skills/web/node-bridge-build`](skills/web/node-bridge-build) ¬Ј [perimeterx-re-warterbili вЖЧ](https://github.com/warterbili/PerimeterX_RE) ¬Ј [px3cookie-warterbili вЖЧ](https://github.com/warterbili/px3cookie) |
| **Ruishu / Rivers Security** | web | Ruishu 412 protection вАФ Cookie T generation + URL suffix (VM bytecode вЖТ Huffman/XOR/AES-CBC/CRC32) | pure-algorithm | рЯЯҐ in-repo | [`skills/web/ruishu-reverse`](skills/web/ruishu-reverse) ¬Ј [ruishu-reverse-walkthrough вЖЧ](https://github.com/warterbili/ruishu-re) |

| **Shopee Food (Vietnam)** | web | Shopee Food request signing (native signature) | pure-algorithm | рЯЯ† pointer-only | [shopee-food-reverse-warterbili вЖЧ](https://github.com/warterbili/shopee_food_reverse) |

### Per-target detail

- **Akamai Bot Manager** вАФ Fingerprint Akamai by its cookies and reverse the sensor_data / _abck handshake.
  <br><sub>routing hints: `_abck`, `bm_sz`, `ak_bmsc`, `sbsd`, `sensor_data`, `BMP`</sub>
- **BOSSзЫіиБШ (Boss Zhipin)** вАФ NOT reversed as an algorithm вАФ mitm-RPC pattern drives an already-logged-in real browser (see jsrpc-universal). Algorithm body lives in the external repo.
  <br><sub>routing hints: `zhipin.com`, `__zp_stoken__`, `zp_token`, `zp_stoken`, `зЫіиБШ`</sub>
- **Bilibili** вАФ Full native-Java algorithm reconstruction вАФ regenerate sign/ticket/access_key and replay any signed endpoint.
  <br><sub>routing hints: `BзЂЩ`, `tv.danmaku.bili`, `BiliDroid`, `libbili.so`, `appkey 1d8b6e7d45233436`</sub>
- **Castle.io** вАФ Generator + decoder for X-Castle-Request-Token / x-castle-client-id; end-to-end verified on DailyPay (see case).
  <br><sub>routing hints: `io.castle.android`, `Highwind`, `X-Castle-Request-Token`, `x-castle-client-id`, `__cuid`</sub>
- **PerimeterX / HUMAN** вАФ Pure-algorithm _px3/_px2 cookie generation (no browser); jsdom env-patching bridge as fallback.
  <br><sub>routing hints: `_px3`, `_px2`, `_pxN`, `px-cloud.net`, `sensor.grubhub.com`, `HUMAN Security`</sub>
- **Ruishu / Rivers Security** вАФ Pure-algorithm Cookie T derivation; JsRpc universal-bypass as the alternate route.
  <br><sub>routing hints: `зСЮжХ∞`, `Rivers`, `HTTP 412`, `$_ts.cd`, `$_ts.nsd`, `Cookie T`</sub>
- **Shopee Food (Vietnam)** вАФ Pure-algorithm request-signature reimplementation (no browser/RPC). Lives in the external repo; not yet bundled in-repo.
  <br><sub>routing hints: `shopeefood`, `ShopeeFood`, `foody`</sub>

---

<sub>рЯЯ† pointer-only means the reversing exists in a first-party external repo but is
